name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for TR_datastructures
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: TiagoRodrigues1111
---

## Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature you would like to see.

## Motivation

Why would this feature be useful? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed API

If applicable, sketch out what the API might look like:

```c
/* example of proposed function signatures */
TR_NODISCARD TR_API tr_result_t tr_stack_peek_at(const struct stack *id_of_stack,
                                                   size_t              index,
                                                   void               *data_out);
```

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative approaches you have considered and why you prefer this one.

## Additional context

Any other relevant information, links, or references.
